Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Excellent base depth and grooming.  The snow was already pretty sticky by 11:00am with the warm temps and sun.  Possible snow later this week means there is still a chance of nice ski conditions right up until closing day on April 5th.  If you can hit the freeze-thaw just right it’s awesome out there.

nubsNob.liftsOpen: 6 Lifts, Space Worm and Rope Tow.
nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails were groomed on Saturday and are in great shape.
nubsNob.comments: The snow is soft machine groomed corduroy. The high temperature will reach nearly 50 degrees this afternoon. The best skiing will likely be in the morning before the snow gets soft from warm weather. NASTAR racing today from 12:30 to 2:30 p.m. The soup of the day is polish sausage and cabbage. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar. The lifts are spinning daily from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
